positive: A whimsical, highly detailed illustration of a bioluminescent forest at twilight. Giant, glowing mushrooms illuminate the path, and tiny, winged sprites flit between fern fronds. Style: Studio Ghibli meets Art Nouveau, deep indigo and emerald color palette, volumetric lighting, cinematic composition, digital painting, ultra-detailed.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, oversaturated, harsh lines, photorealism
